shot_type_and_framing: medium close-up with the food platter centered in the lower two-thirds of the 9:16 frame
camera_movement: slow push-in towards the platter to emphasize texture and detail
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a 50mm focal length style, shallow depth of field to softly blur the background
environment_description: neutral beige countertop with a spice rack on the upper left blurred in the background and hanging wooden kitchen utensils on the upper right
subject_description: a white decorative platter with four triangular golden-brown samosas, three round golden-brown fried balls, and a small white bowl containing green chutney on the right side
motion_behavior: static with subtle natural focus shifts due to camera movement, no object motion
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, realistic, clean, and premium filmic presentation with warm, natural colors
